top_stories.title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers — Cowboy Space raised $275M to build them
top_stories.description: The apparently insatiable demand for AI compute has data center entrepreneurs looking to the stars. There's a key problem: There aren't enough rockets to put data centers in orbit around Earth, and they're too expensive.
top_stories.author: Tim Fernholz
top_stories.content: The apparently insatiable demand for AI compute has data center entrepreneurs looking to the stars. There's a key problem: There aren't enough rockets to put data centers in orbit around Earth, and they're too expensive.

top_stories.title: Beyond BI: How the Dataset Q&A feature of Amazon Quick powers the next generation of data decisions
top_stories.description: Business leaders across industries rely on operational dashboards as the shared source of truth that their teams execute against daily. But dashboards are built to answer known questions. When teams need to explore further, ad-hoc, multi-dimensional, or unforeseen questions, they hit a bottleneck. They wait hours or days for BI teams to build new views […]
top_stories.author: Salim Khan

top_stories.title: OpenAI Introduces Daybreak: A Cybersecurity Initiative That Puts Codex Security at the Center of Vulnerability Detection and Patch Validation
top_stories.description: OpenAI on just launched Daybreak, a cybersecurity initiative that combines the company’s frontier AI models with Codex Security, its coding-focused agentic system, and a broad network of security partners. top_stories.title: Streamlining generative AI development with MLflow v3.10 on Amazon SageMaker AI
top_stories.description: Today, we’re excited to announce that Amazon SageMaker AI MLflow Apps now support MLflow version 3.10, bringing enhanced capabilities for generative AI development and streamlined experiment tracking to your generative AI workflows. Building on the foundations established with Amazon SageMaker AI MLflow Apps, this latest version introduces powerful new features for observability, evaluation, and generative […]
